dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, you have done it. {quest_threat} will not trouble us again, and {quest_stakes} are finally safe.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: When word spread that someone stood up for {quest_focus}, I saw hope return to faces that had forgotten what it looked like.
dialogueChunks.outro: You have given us a second chance. We will not waste it.

playerResponses.text: Take care of each other. That is all the thanks I need.
Just make sure it does not happen again.
Remember this the next time a stranger needs help.

dialogueChunks.intro: I hardly know what to say, {player_name}. After everything with {quest_threat}, we had almost given up.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} has already started restoring {quest_focus}. {quest_stakes} are recovering, slowly but surely. It will take time, but the danger has passed.
dialogueChunks.outro: You answered our plea when no one else would. That means more than you know.

playerResponses.text: I am glad I could help.

dialogueChunks.intro: It is over, {player_name}. Truly over. {quest_threat} are gone, and {quest_focus} stands whole again.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_stakes} will sleep soundly tonight for the first time since {quest_origin}. The whole settlement owes you a debt we may never fully repay.
dialogueChunks.outro: If you ever need anything from us, you need only ask.

playerResponses.text: Look after your people. That is repayment enough.
I may take you up on that someday.
